name: Discount Car Title Loan & Personal Loans - San Antonio
description_short: San Antonio title loan and personal installment lender offering same-day funding up to $10,000 with online and in-store options.
description_long:
Discount Car Title Loan & Personal Loans operates a physical storefront at 930 SW Military Drive in San Antonio, TX, established in October 2018. The company specializes in two primary loan products: car title loans (secured by vehicle title) and personal installment loans (unsecured, traditional loans). Both products are designed for rapid cash access, with title loans available 100% online and fundable within 45 minutes to same-day delivery.

The company offers title loans and personal installment loans ranging from $125 to $10,000 with flexible terms of 3 to 6 months and equal monthly payments. Title loan applications can be completed entirely online at dtloans.com/online, requiring photo uploads of ID, vehicle, and car title. Personal loans use traditional underwriting based on creditworthiness and ability to pay. The company advertises "short term loan discounts" that customers can earn through on-time payment, claiming potential savings up to 50%. No prepayment penalties or restrictions on partial prepayments are mentioned.

The San Antonio location distinguishes itself through positive customer reviews highlighting fast processing, friendly service from named staff (Rachel, Rafaela, Fred), transparent explanation of loan terms, and same-day funding capability. The company offers both digital and in-person services, with online-only title loans eliminating the need for storefront visits. Physical location convenience near SW Military Drive and Pleasanton Road is emphasized for walk-in customers.

While the website advertises discounts and fast funding, critical loan cost information (APR, finance charges, specific fees) is not disclosed in the available content. The company operates under a "CONSUMER DISCLOSURES & SCHEDULE OF FEES" section but details are not provided. Loan terms are limited to maximum 6 months, which may not suit customers needing longer repayment periods. Title loans require a lien-free vehicle title, excluding borrowers with existing auto loans.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 100% online title loan application with funding possible within 45 minutes to same-day
Personal installment loans up to $10,000 with 3-6 month terms and equal monthly payments
No prepayment penalties or restrictions on partial prepayments
Advertises discounts for on-time payment potentially reducing loan costs by up to 50%
Consistently positive customer reviews praising fast processing and friendly staff service
Dual service model: physical storefront at 930 SW Military Dr + fully online title loan option
Low minimum loan amount ($125) for small emergency cash needs
cons: APR, finance charges, and specific fee schedule not disclosed on website despite reference to consumer disclosures
Title loans require lien-free vehicle title, excluding borrowers with existing auto loans
Maximum 6-month loan term may not accommodate customers seeking longer repayment periods
Personal installment loans appear to require traditional credit underwriting, potentially limiting approval for poor-credit borrowers
Limited transparency on how advertised discounts are calculated or what qualification criteria apply
best_for: Vehicle owners needing $1,000-$10,000 in emergency cash with lien-free car titles
San Antonio residents seeking same-day or next-day funding for unexpected expenses
Borrowers preferring online application without in-person storefront visits
Customers seeking flexible 3-6 month repayment terms with no prepayment penalties
diagnosis: Best for San Antonio-area vehicle owners needing $1,000-$10,000 in quick cash with lien-free titles and the ability to repay within 3-6 months. The main caveat is absence of disclosed APR/fee information and loan terms capped at 6 months maximum, which limits suitability for customers needing longer repayment periods or transparent cost comparison.
services: In-person loan consultations at San Antonio storefront
Early payoff and partial prepayment options (no penalties)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 930 SW Military Dr, San Antonio, TX 78221
